name: BlueKCGdgCareMailDispostionFileExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT C.COMM_SK, C.COMM_ID as FileIdentifier, C.COMM_FILE_NM as OriginalFilename, C.COMM_TMPLT_NM as TemplateName, C.COMM_SENT_DTM as FilePrintDate, C.COMM_JOB_ID as JobNumber, null as DocumentPageCount, C.COMM_STTUS_CD, CAST(C.IMG_ID as varchar(40)) as IMG_ID, SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(C.IMG_ID)),1,2) as SourceCode, T.VIEW_ID as VIEW_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM] C Inner Join [COMM_TRNSMSN].[dbo].[COMM_TMPLT_RECPNT_TRNSMSN_TYP] T ON C.COMM_TMPLT_NM = T.COMM_TMPLT_RECPNT_TRNSMSN_TYP_NM WHERE C.COMM_TMPLT_NM not like '%_FAC' AND C.COMM_TMPLT_NM not like '%_RPRV' AND C.COMM_TMPLT_NM not like '%_SPRV' AND ((C.COMM_TRGT_SYS_MDUL_CD='NXTPG' AND C.COMM_TYP_CD IN ('MAILRSPNS','MAILACK') AND C.COMM_STTUS_CD IN ('SUCCESS','FAILED','NO-PDF','PDFRCVD')) OR (C.COMM_TRGT_SYS_MDUL_CD='NXTPG' AND C.COMM_TYP_CD IN ('ALTRSTAFILE','AGPAHUBFILE') AND C.COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR'))

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Z1_TMP_GC; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Z1_TMP_AG; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Z1_TMP_MAILDISP; WITH cte1 AS (SELECT *, CASE WHEN COMM_STTUS_CD='SUCCESS' THEN 'Mail Successful' ELSE 'Mail Failed' END AS StageVar_Status FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Z1_TMP_BlueKCGdgCareMailDispostionFileExtr), cte2 AS (SELECT *, 'No provider data was found' AS StageVar_ErrorMessage FROM cte1) SELECT FileIdentifier, OriginalFilename, CASE WHEN COMM_STTUS_CD IN ('ERROR','FAILED') THEN NULL ELSE FilePrintDate END AS FilePrintDate, JobNumber, DocumentPageCount, CASE WHEN COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR' THEN '' ELSE dbo.trim_default(REPLACE(@{pipeline().parameters.PerceptiveURL}, 'replace', VIEW_ID)) + '%27' + IMG_ID + '%27>' + TemplateName + '-' + StageVar_Status + '' END AS Link, CASE WHEN COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR' THEN StageVar_ErrorMessage ELSE StageVar_Status END AS [Status] INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Z1_TMP_GC FROM cte2 WHERE SourceCode='GC'; SELECT REPLACE(FileIdentifier,'AG','') AS FileIdentifier, OriginalFilename, CASE WHEN COMM_STTUS_CD IN ('ERROR','FAILED') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(LEFT(dbo.trim_default(FilePrintDate),10) AS datetime) END AS FilePrintDate, JobNumber, DocumentPageCount, CASE WHEN COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR' THEN '' ELSE dbo.trim_default(REPLACE(@{pipeline().parameters.PerceptiveURL}, 'replace', VIEW_ID)) + '%27' + IMG_ID + '%27>' + TemplateName + '-' + StageVar_Status + '' END AS Link, CASE WHEN COMM_STTUS_CD='ERROR' THEN StageVar_ErrorMessage ELSE StageVar_Status END AS [Status] INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Z1_TMP_AG FROM cte2 WHERE SourceCode='AG'; SELECT COMM_SK, FileIdentifier AS COMM_ID, 'COMMTRNSMSN' AS COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, CASE WHEN SourceCode='GC' THEN 'ALTRSTA' WHEN SourceCode='AG' THEN 'AGPAHUB' ELSE '' END AS COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, 'SUCCESS' AS COMM_STTUS_CD, 'MAILDSPSTN' AS COMM_TYP_CD, 'Mail Disposition Successful' AS COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, GETDATE() AS LAST_UPDT_DTM INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Z1_TMP_MAILDISP FROM cte2
